use_codes.desc: IMPROVEMENT OF WALKING IN PATIENTS WITH MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS (MS)

indications.text:
AMPYRA (dalfampridine) is indicated as a treatment to improve walking in patients with multiple sclerosis (MS). This was
demonstrated by an increase in walking speed [see Clinical Studies (14)].

AMPYRA is indicated as a treatment to improve walking in adult patients with multiple sclerosis (MS). This
was demonstrated by an increase in walking speed [see Clinical Studies (14)].
